raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged 3 times for a service from XXXX that I did not order and reported this to the credit card company ( Barclays ). They ultimately sent a form letter that they contacted the merchant who validated the transaction. This form letter also misrepresented that on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year> they attempted to contact me and did not receive a response. That is untrue, no attempt to contact me was made, not by phone, not by fax, not by email and not by letter. 

I spoke to the number they provided in their letters. Six times they requested the last 4 of my social security. It was an obvious attempt to avoid responsibility.
